compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: RAM RVK series, Systemair RVK-A, Rhino Pro inline fans
compatible_devices.notes: Functionally identical to Hybrid Controller Mk2 but ships with the 1.6m light sensor pre-included and PRO function ready to activate. Controls 2 standard AC fans (FAN AIR IN + FAN AIR OUT Schuko sockets). 5-step heavy-duty mechanical transformer for silent speed control. Available 4A, 8A, and 16A variants. PRO light-sensor function manages humidity via fan speed increase during dark periods only — no separate humidifier or other device output. EC fans incompatible.
